title: Quran, Sura 113: Al-Falaq
description: Sura 113 (Al-Falaq: The Daybreak) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 113 (Al-Falaq: The Daybreak) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak, from the evil of that which He created, and from the evil of darkness when it settles.
